claimText: Mumbai and Visakhapatnam are the selected landing sites in India for Meta's undersea cable project, Waterworth.
evidenceExcerpt: Meta has selected Mumbai and Visakhapatnam as the landing sites for the undersea cable project, Waterworth.
examUse: Statement-based question on the locations of major infrastructure projects in India.
distractorHooks: Google or Amazon instead of Meta

claimText: Project Waterworth is the world's longest subsea cable project.
evidenceExcerpt: It is the world’s longest subsea cable project.
examUse: Fact-based statement in a multi-statement question about global internet infrastructure.

claimText: Project Waterworth will connect five major continents using fiber-optic cables.
evidenceExcerpt: It will connect five major continents using fiber-optic cables.
examUse: Statement-based question on the scope of Project Waterworth.

claimText: Undersea cables are fiber-optic cables laid across the ocean floor that act as the backbone of the international internet.
evidenceExcerpt: Undersea cables are fiber-optic cable laid across the ocean floor that transmits information and enables worldwide communications. Significance: Undersea cables are backbone of international internet.
examUse: Conceptual statement on the technology behind global internet connectivity.
distractorHooks: Use copper wires instead of fiber-optic
Rely primarily on satellite communication for the internet backbone
